description_long: This storage box features a robust, industrial design with a metallic blue body accented by olive green reinforced edges and corners. The front and back panels display a prominent circular emblem with a radiation warning symbol, suggesting it is intended for hazardous or sensitive materials. The box is constructed with visible bolts and panel lines, giving it a rugged, secure appearance suitable for urban or industrial environments. The top section includes a recessed handle and two latch mechanisms, indicating it can be securely closed and easily transported. The surface is glossy and slightly worn, with scuff marks and scratches that hint at frequent use. Its compact, cubic form and reinforced structure make it ideal for stacking or placement in garages, warehouses, or secure storage areas.
description: A rugged, metallic blue storage box with olive green reinforced edges, radiation warning emblems, and a secure latch and handle system. The box has a glossy, worn finish and is designed for secure, stackable storage in urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the radiation warning emblem, a metallic handle, and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the latch mechanisms and a recessed handle on the top, with plain paneling and reinforced edges.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, featuring the same radiation warning emblem and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing latch mechanisms and plain paneling.
